---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What Problem Does This Solve?

Describe the use case or pain point.

## Proposed Solution

How should this work?

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Module

Which part of the framework would this affect?

- [ ] Core (night shift runner)
- [ ] Protocols (inter-agent communication)
- [ ] Plugins (new plugin or plugin system)
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Templates (new prompt template)
- [ ] Documentation
